name: envelope-recordtype-unknown
description: `recordType` is a closed discriminator (§7.1: 'Closed discriminator: the record kind (list above)') over the fixed §5/§7 record kinds (Measurement, Program, Session, Block, Exercise, WorkUnit, ThresholdProfile, StatusPeriod) plus the tombstone form. A `recordType` value outside that closed set (e.g. an invented "Snapshot") matches none of the record's oneOf branches and MUST fail schema validation.
